ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy meter */,
  "meter_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy meter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the energy meter is installed */,
  "measurement_interval" INTEGER /* Measurement interval in seconds */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the energy meter */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the energy meter */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy meter was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the meter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the meter (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter that made the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Watts measurement */,
  "volts" REAL /* Volts measurement */,
  "amps" REAL /* Amps measurement */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power Factor (PF) measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that made the measurement (if applicable) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the measurement in Hertz */,
  "power_quality_index" REAL /* Index indicating the quality of power */,
  "harmonic_distortion" REAL /* Level of harmonic distortion in the measurement */,
  "voltage_unbalance" REAL /* Level of voltage unbalance in the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Measurement_Meta" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the metadata belongs to */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the measurement */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the measurement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metadata entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Measurement_Meta_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Measurement_Analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., energy efficiency, power quality) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis result was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the analysis result */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis result was last modified */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., algorithm, tool) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Measurement_Analysis_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Energy_Consumption_Trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the trend belongs to */,
  "time_interval" INTEGER /* Time interval for the trend (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the time interval */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trend entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the trend entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend entry was last modified */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Energy_Consumption_Trends_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Energy_Consumption_Forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Predicted energy consumption on the forecast date */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forecast entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the forecast entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast entry was last modified */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Energy_Consumption_Forecasts_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high energy consumption, low energy consumption) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the alert */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last modified */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Alerts_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Reports_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_meter_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the setting */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_meter_settings_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_meter_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the calibration belongs to */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the calibration entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the calibration entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the calibration entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the calibration entry was last modified */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for the calibration (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_meter_calibration_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_meter_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the maintenance belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the maintenance entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the maintenance entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance entry was last modified */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_meter_maintenance_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)
